prompt: A vast amber desert landscape with a single tiny silhouette figure on a dune ridge against a hazy ochre sky. Single hard directional light source from the left casting a long shadow. Volumetric dust haze in the air catching light rays. Desaturated warm amber tone dominating the entire frame. Massive negative space — 80% empty sky and sand. 16:9, ultrawide cinematic framing, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
